evals.expected_output: Resolves base (main) automatically, runs codex review --base and a fresh Claude review subagent in parallel on the same base...HEAD diff, merges into one agreement-ranked report with Agreed/Claude-only/Codex-only sections. Does not modify files or post comments.

evals.prompt: get a second opinion from codex and claude on my branch before I open the PR — diff against develop
evals.expected_output: Uses develop as the base (override honored), runs both reviewers in parallel on the same diff, merged report. Review-only.

evals.prompt: cross-check my changes on this branch with both models
evals.expected_output: Triggers review-all, auto-resolves base, dual-model parallel review, merged agreement-ranked report.
